title: Wall Street Analysts Believe CRH (CRH) Could Rally 28.71%: Here's is How to Trade
text: The mean of analysts' price targets for CRH (CRH) points to a 28.7% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.

title: Is CRH (CRH) a Great Value Stock Right Now?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: Does CRH (CRH) Have the Potential to Rally 27.88% as Wall Street Analysts Expect?
text: The average of price targets set by Wall Street analysts indicates a potential upside of 27.9% in CRH (CRH). While the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric is questionable, the positive trend in earnings estimate revisions might translate into an upside in the stock.
